items.title: Sector Update: Financial Stocks Advance Late Afternoon
items.description: Financial stocks rose in late Wednesday afternoon trading, with the NYSE Financial Index increasing

items.title: CNBC Daily Open: Traders are betting for a rate cut — but a hike could be on the table
items.description: Traders think there's a roughly 50% of the Fed cutting rates in June, according to the CME FedWatch tool. Perhaps they should start considering the possibility of higher interest rates, too.

items.title: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.description: The major averages managed to post gains on Wednesday as tech shares rose. It was the third straight positive day for the S&P 500.

items.title: Sector Update: Financial Stocks Rise in Afternoon Trading
items.description: Financial stocks were advancing in Wednesday afternoon trading, with the NYSE Financial Index rising

items.title: Huge AI Jobs Disruption Is Coming. What It Means For The S&P 500 And You.
items.description: Many companies are already freezing or cutting staff on the expectation of huge AI-fueled productivity gains.
